_comment_model: Internal label for the evolutionary models
name: Sonora Bobcat
_comment_ADS: ADS link to the model publication (optional)
_comment_filename_pattern: Common pattern recognized in evolutionary table filenames
_comment_metallicities: Bundled [M/H] values in dex (C/O = 1.0 for all tables)
_comment_columns: Columns in each evolutionary table data row (logI is parsed out and ignored)
_comment_units: Units of the parsed grid quantities returned by read_evolutionary_model
